baseline.name: single-condition database index strategy evaluation baseline
baseline.description: Evaluate one fixed condition without the proposed diagnostic comparison.

problem_method_insight: database index strategy evaluation should be evaluated by separating data quality from system behavior.
falsifiable_hypothesis: The proposed comparison improves query latency by at least 0.05 over the baseline; a smaller gain falsifies the hypothesis.

minimum_key_experiment.name: minimum database index strategy evaluation comparison
minimum_key_experiment.success_threshold: proposed query latency - baseline query latency >= 0.05

stop_conditions: The evaluation set has fewer than 30 independent examples
